estimatedRevenue.summary: Celebration funded by sponsors · toy gifts collected separately

gifts.name: Safe Celebration
gifts.tagline: 1 slot · private security for a packed District 56 evening.
gifts.description: The only cash core underwrite for the celebration — day-of private security so families can attend safely (entry points, crowd flow, hall presence). Past seasons ran about $500–$750. Dinner, Santa, crafts, and the rest of the evening are gift-registry stories, not core ops. Toys for charities and District 56 venue are separate lanes (toys collected from guests; venue typically in-kind).

gifts.name: Spread the Word
gifts.tagline: 2 slots · share the print pool — flyers and banners that fill the room.
gifts.description: Contribute to the celebration print pool — flyers, banners, and Champion-style jobs that invite families and thank sponsors. Slot count is a share pool (recent seasons spent about $150–$280 total), not 2× full print runs. Logo on printed materials when the design includes a sponsor strip.
benefits: Logo on flyer strip when layout allows

gifts.name: Raffle Items
gifts.tagline: 20 slots · $100 cash underwrite · in-kind prizes about $100–$250 retail welcome.
gifts.description: Stock the raffle. Cash is $100 per slot (we buy prizes). In-kind donations of new items about $100–$250 retail also count as one Raffle Items gift — email contact@elkgrovetoydrive.com before dropping off. Do not treat cash and a separately purchased prize as two different products without noting both on the agreement.
benefits: Raffle sponsor recognition on site signage

gifts.name: Kids Game
gifts.tagline: 5 slots · share the kids-game pool — stations with prizes.
gifts.description: Contribute to kids game stations — prizes, materials, and staffing support. Multi-slot gifts share one station pool; filling all slots funds the lane fully, not five duplicate builds.
benefits: Company sign at game display when produced

gifts.name: Inflatable Carnival Games
gifts.tagline: 3 slots · share deploy cost for our owned 8-station carnival games.
gifts.description: cPALSs + VACOS already own the Magic Jump–class 8-station inflatable carnival games bundle ([product reference](https://www.magicjump.com/blog/inflatable-carnival-games/)). This gift funds deploy cost only — trailer, setup/teardown crew, cleaning, and storage amortization. Complements Kids Game stations. Not bounce houses (vendor rental is a separate product if ever funded).

lineItems.label: Deploy cost share — trailer, crew, cleaning, storage amortization (per slot)

gifts.name: Holiday Show
gifts.tagline: 6 slots · share the entertainment pool — magic, music, stage acts.
gifts.description: Contribute to live performances and stage programming for the District 56 celebration. Slots share the talent/production pool (e.g. magician and related acts), not six separate full shows.
benefits: Logo in sponsor video loop when produced

gifts.name: Chocolate Bar
gifts.description: Fund the chocolate / sweet bar (or hot-cocoa) hospitality station for families throughout the celebration.

gifts.name: Crafts Table
gifts.tagline: 12 slots · share the crafts pool — make-and-take for kids.
gifts.description: Contribute to arts-and-crafts tables — materials and make-and-take activities. Slot count is a share pool for the crafts lane, not twelve independent full builds.
benefits: Company logo on craft table signage when produced

gifts.name: Dinner
gifts.tagline: 10 slots · share the dinner pool — cash or restaurant trays.
gifts.description: Contribute to the free community dinner. Cash slots underwrite catering and service supplies; restaurant trays and other food in-kind count as In-Kind Donation (Food) toward the same Dinner story — not a separate cash tier. Slot count is a share pool for the meal lane.
benefits: Dinner sponsor recognition on menu / serving signage

gifts.name: Video & Photographer
gifts.tagline: 2 slots · share media production for the evening.
gifts.description: Contribute to professional video and photography for families, sponsors, and charities. Paid media vendors are contractors — not automatically Video & Photographer sponsors unless this gift is funded and deliverables are received.
benefits: Media sponsor recognition in highlight reel credits
Logo option on select photo backdrops
Logo in sponsor video loop when produced

gifts.name: Volunteer Care
gifts.tagline: 2 slots · share volunteer hospitality — meals, shirts, care.
gifts.description: Support the volunteer corps — meals, shirts, hydration, and appreciation so about 50–60 day-of volunteers can serve guests and charities. Slots share that hospitality pool.

gifts.name: Santa Photo
gifts.tagline: 1 slot · free professional photos with Santa.
gifts.description: Underwrite the full Santa photo experience — photographer, staging, and Santa hospitality — so families get free Christmas-card photos. Paying a photographer alone without Santa/staging is a contractor expense, not this gift.
benefits: Featured logo on photo backdrop (when available)
Priority Santa photos for sponsor guests when scheduled

gifts.name: Christmas Decorations
gifts.tagline: 2 slots · share décor — turn District 56 into a winter wonderland.
gifts.description: Contribute to immersive Christmas décor — trees, lighting, themed zones. Two slots share the décor package; both filled means the lane is fully funded.
benefits: Decor naming credit on entrance / main hall

sponsorTiers.label: Friend
sponsorTiers.tagline: 10 slots · $100 · recognition when you don’t care which gift to fund
sponsorTiers.description: Traditional recognition tier for sponsors who want website + MC thanks without picking a Fund the Fete story. Claim this tier on its own; gift naming is optional and separate.

sponsorTiers.label: Community
sponsorTiers.tagline: 5 slots · $750 · recognition when you don’t care which gift to fund
sponsorTiers.description: Traditional recognition tier for sponsors who want logo + digital shout-out without picking a Fund the Fete story. Claim this tier on its own; gift naming is optional and separate.

sponsorTiers.label: Celebration
sponsorTiers.tagline: 3 slots · $1,500 · recognition when you don’t care which gift to fund
sponsorTiers.description: Traditional recognition tier for stronger digital recognition without picking a Fund the Fete story. Claim this tier on its own; gift naming is optional and separate.
benefits: Mention in email to mailing list

sponsorTiers.label: Presenting
sponsorTiers.tagline: 2 slots · $2,500 · traditional co-presenting package (2025 Presenting substance)
sponsorTiers.description: Traditional flagship tier — same role as 2025 Presenting. Claim this package for toys, VIP registrations, stage presence, and strong logo placement — fulfilled by the sponsorship benefits executor after payment clears. Optional: also fund a Fund the Fete gift for story naming (e.g. Santa Photo presented by [You]).
benefits: Presenting-level website placement and featured logo
Mention in email to mailing list
About 10 unwrapped toys contributed toward charity distribution (purchased or collected under your gift)
About 10 celebration VIP registrations for your guests when registration is open
Opportunity to speak on stage when the run-of-show allows
Priority Santa photos for sponsor guests when scheduled
Logo in sponsor video loop and on flyer strip when produced

sponsorTiers.label: Title
sponsorTiers.tagline: 2 slots · $5,000 · traditional title package (2025 Event Sponsor substance)
sponsorTiers.description: Traditional flagship tier — same role as 2025 Event Sponsor (named Title in 2026). Claim this package for larger toy and VIP commitments, retractable banner, and headline recognition — fulfilled by the sponsorship benefits executor after payment clears. Optional: also fund a Fund the Fete gift for story naming.
benefits: Title on primary materials and hero logo on website
About 20 unwrapped toys contributed toward charity distribution
About 20 celebration VIP registrations for your guests when registration is open
Company retractable banner placement when produced
Website, email, and social marketing including participating-school channels when activated
Logo in sponsor video loop and on flyer strip when produced

globalPerks.label: Stage recognition
globalPerks.description: MC thank-yous for sponsors during the celebration.

globalPerks.label: Website logo roll
globalPerks.description: Sponsor logos and names on elkgrovetoydrive.com.
